name: cogni-gpt-researcher
description: Multi-agent research report generator. STORM-inspired editorial workflow with parallel section research, claims-verified review loops, and five report types (basic, detailed, deep, outline, resource). Supports web, local, and hybrid research sources. Configurable tones, citation formats (APA/MLA/Chicago/Harvard/IEEE), auto agent-role selection, source curation, domain filtering, and optional image generation. Integrates with cogni-claims for source verification. Native Claude Code implementation.
